revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or...
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove deleted category M1YearInTopic (no calendar)/link
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
